name: huntova-notion
description: Push every saved lead to a Notion database row. The default indie-workspace integration.
author: huntova-core

name: huntova-apollo
description: Verify and enrich contacts via Apollo.io. Transforms 'found a website' into 'found a verified person'. User supplies APOLLO_KEY.
author: huntova-core

name: huntova-webhook
description: Generic POST-on-save webhook. One plugin unlocks Zapier / Make / n8n / Airtable / Discord for everyone.
author: huntova-core

name: huntova-emailguard
description: MX + SMTP handshake via dnspython. Drops leads whose email domain has no working mail server before you waste credits drafting outreach.
author: huntova-core

name: huntova-hiring-signal
description: Scrapes job boards for 'we're hiring X' posts. Adds timing intelligence — leads with active hiring are 4x more likely to respond.
author: huntova-core

name: huntova-wappalyzer
description: Detect tech stack from each prospect's homepage; tags the lead with detected platforms.
author: community
